name: Research Biomedical Figure
description: Nature / Cell style biomedical research figures with UMAP plots, dot plots, and cell trajectories.
template:
Create a {prompt}

Style requirements:
- Nature / Cell style biomedical research figure
- Soft minimal palette: pastel teal, sage, lavender, peach, slate, amber
- Publication-ready with compact legends and readable micro-labels
- White background, thin gray axes, restrained typography
- Elegant spacing, no 3D, no glossy UI
- No fake journal logo, no watermark

Density control:
- 4-6 visual elements
- Each element has clear biological purpose
- Balance detail with clarity
- One clear focal visualization with supporting analyses
